# init(conversationUUID:)

**Initializer**

Creates an action that ends a conversation.

## Declaration

```swift
init(conversationUUID: UUID)
```

## Parameters

- **conversationUUID**: The unique identifier of the conversation you want to end.
title: init(conversationUUID:)
